column2: What is the correct sequence of letters in Tamil for essential mastery? (Tamil Phonics, etc.)
column3: The earlier samacheer sequence, Singapore and other research study sequences are different from the conventional/current sequence used in the textbooks. But if we have to align it with the TN curriculum or supplement it, then we have to follow the same.
